pi_items.source: Task specification - arbitrary user-defined name for compound area-time unit group
Task specification - arbitrary user-defined name for flow property
openLCA standard: reference unit must have factor 1.0
Specified in task metadata, consistent with factor=1.0
Standard acre-to-hectare conversion: 1 acre = 0.40468564224 hectares. Metadata value matches to 6 significant digits.
Task specification - sufficient tolerance for acre-hectare conversion accuracy
Task specification - represents 3 growing seasons per year, plausible for tropical/subtropical agricultural regions with multiple cropping cycles
Task specification - reasonable tolerance for seasonal conversion factor

privileged_info_summary: This task requires creating a custom unit group 'Agricultural Area-Time' in openLCA with three compound area-time units. The acre-to-hectare conversion factor (0.404686) is verified to match the standard international conversion (0.40468564224 hectares per acre). The reference unit ha*season correctly has factor 1.0. The year-to-season factor of 3.0 represents a plausible agricultural scenario for regions with multiple annual cropping cycles. All unit names and structure are properly defined for an irrigated agriculture LCA application.
